title: nuphar microcarpa
intro: Nuphar microcarpa, also known as the small-leaf water-lily or small yellow water-lily, is a plant species in the Nuphar genus. The plant's rhizomes and roots are used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Nuphar microcarpa include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and kidney stones, as well as its use as a digestive aid. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
